sourceMovie.title: Deadpool 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Deadpool 2 works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Deadpool
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Deadpool 2 clicked for you, Deadpool (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Deadpool 2?
faq.answer: Try Deadpool, Thor: Ragnarok, The Suicide Squad—each shares DNA with Deadpool 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Deadpool 2?
faq.answer: Deadpool 2 (2018) is best described as Action, Comedy, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Deadpool 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Deadpool Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
